# Post-Wick

> Get more customers on autopilot.

Post-Wick is a social media automation platform for small businesses. Drop your website URL and Post-Wick researches your brand, generates SEO-, GEO-, and conversion-focused posts, and publishes to LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, and more after you approve.

## What Post-Wick does

- Crawls your website to learn your brand, industry, and topics
- Generates a balanced mix of SEO, GEO (AI-discoverability), and money (conversion) posts
- Lets you refine captions and images in plain language before publishing
- Connects to LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, and other channels

## Key pages

- Home: https://post-wick.vercel.app/
- About: https://post-wick.vercel.app/about
- Contact: https://post-wick.vercel.app/contact
- Privacy: https://post-wick.vercel.app/privacy
- Terms: https://post-wick.vercel.app/terms

## Tagline

Get more customers on autopilot.
